summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CarryOn™ estate planning platform. All core features tested successfully including login with OTP, dashboard, document vault, milestone messages, beneficiaries management, Estate Guardian AI, action checklist, trustee services, estate transition, and settings. Multi-role testing completed for benefactor, beneficiary, and admin accounts.

Frontend login flow with OTP verification
